description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsRed wallet with two press button closure Self binding with metal brand badge on the frontFive credit card slots, a photo id card holder with two slip pockets on the flapFour credit card slots, one zippered and three main compartments One zippered compartment set in liningPocket at back with flap and magnetic button closureGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
